name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M64064 Cream Print 】M14968 Pochette Félicie chain bag is crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather, subtly embossing the classic Louis Vuitton Monogram pattern. The envelope shape features ample space, with a zip pocket and card slot pocket that are detachable. Fasten the chain to explore more modern carrying styles. 21 x 12 x 3 cm (L x H x W)
